items.description: All features at time t use only information available at or before t
items.explanation: Chronological split and lagged features only; no future lookahead.

items.description: The 3-day-ahead target is never used in feature scaling
items.explanation: Scaling is fit on the training subset only and excludes the target column.

items.description: Scaling parameters are fitted on training data only, then applied to val/test
items.explanation: Train-only means and standard deviations; no data leakage from future.

items.description: Rolling statistics (volatility, sentiment) use only past/current observations
items.explanation: Rolling features are built with lag/shift operations ensuring causality.

items.description: Graph construction uses training-period data only for each split
items.explanation: Graph helper consumes the training panel only; test data never enter edge score computation.

items.description: MIS selection is computed using training-period graph only
items.explanation: Selected on the graph returned from training-period data only.

items.description: MAML support/query splits are chronological and non-overlapping; test set is fully held out
items.explanation: Support set from early training period, query set from later training period. Test set never touched.

items.description: Validation data are not used in meta-training updates except for early stopping
items.explanation: Validation used only for model selection (best checkpoint) and early stopping of meta-learning.

items.description: Test data are never used for feature selection, token selection, graph construction, scaling, tuning, early stopping, or meta-training
items.explanation: Test rows are held out before any tuning, scaling, or meta-training occurs.

items.description: All ablation variants and all baselines use the same token subset, same chronological split, same forecast horizon, and same target transformation
items.explanation: Ablation variants are derived from the same processed panel with identical splits. All baseline runners receive identical train/val/test frames.
